scope: Admin Chromium/in-app Browser traversal for /communications/calls when no live video provider is configured: create Jitsi video room, start session, attempt connect, verify visible degraded denial instead of fake join success.
steps: Seed dev data after DB test reset.
Create a Jitsi video call room from the empty-state room dialog.
Click Connect without accepting camera/microphone permission prompts.
expected: No silent fake join success when provider is disabled/unconfigured.
The UI keeps the session management controls visible and reports the provider-disabled denial.
This does not request or accept camera/microphone permission.

limitations: Does not verify real Chrome camera/microphone permission prompt because accepting those prompts needs action-time user confirmation.
Does not verify OBS virtual camera, real microphone, LiveKit media publishing, external Jitsi page, remote participant, reconnect, or leave/rejoin.
This covers the explicit no-provider/degraded browser path only.
passCriteria: Persistent page text includes provider-disabled denial: Видеосвязь отключена. Сервер отклонил действие.
Session remains started/managed with Подключиться, Я вошёл, Я вышел, Завершить сессию controls.
No camera/microphone permission prompt was accepted.
